user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Amanda Reyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3seYV71eFCNoHMfsaaQp5dIHWEj-ejm8F3bEpKJjd680XiuZs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is incredible! They offer such a wide variety of services — there’s truly something for everyone. I originally went in after hurting my arm and decided to try their cryotherapy. The deep tissue icing made a huge difference, and I genuinely feel like my arm healed twice as fast because of it.

They also offer a lot of hair services, and I’ve had a few facials there as well — every experience has been amazing. The staff is always welcoming, knowledgeable, and professional. You can tell they really care about what they do.

Highly recommend to anyone looking for quality services and a great team!

They also have like quarterly meet and greets so you can understand all those offerings which is nice because I ask a lot of questions.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alicia Rains","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLa00SnBIVL3n6OaHEuowEcnhPwYnug5sxtyblTGRd89UaZIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience at Arizona Facial Plastics.

Dr. Ashley Magee was amazing. She took the time to really listen and explain everything, and nothing ever felt rushed or overdone. Since going through menopause, I had started to feel a little off when I looked in the mirror, and now I just feel refreshed and more like myself again.

What’s funny is that friends and family keep telling me I look really good or that I look “so refreshed,” but no one can figure out what I had done. They just know something looks better, and honestly that’s exactly what I wanted.

Sheena did my Hydrafacial and it was incredible. My skin felt so clean and glowy afterward, and it was honestly one of the best facials I’ve had.

The whole team was friendly and professional, pricing was very fair, and they got me in and out without feeling rushed. I also appreciate how easy everything was from start to finish.

I’ll be writing a separate review just for their skincare line because it deserves its own moment. It really is that good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynn Roberson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1h7iIDfWnsAV8Qgq0ZAlKQuu_LgLMGjl1VOjtlaCDbDjSpA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had several procedures at Arizona Facial Plastics, as I needed a lot of work done. My first procedure was a partial face lift including neck, I’ve had three C02 s,  a chemical peel, as well as volumnizing, all have made an amazing difference!!! My skin has improved to the level that it now responds well to all the procedures and looks amazingly younger. I trust Arizona Facial Plastics with my future facial endeavors.
I can’t say enough about the staff:
Shea knew exactly what procedures  I would need and included all of them in my initial package. I’m so thankful for his expertise and professionalism and I do trust him with future endeavors for my skin.
Lindsey runs the desk as well as other office jobs  and does an absolutely amazing job, if she were ever stressed I never knew it. She’s efficient, professional as well as being  so so nice.
Sheena, well I would have to say she’s the best at her job all around. Aside from knowing her professional  duties well, she’s very thorough and supportive.
Dr T performed the face lift snd did an excellent job. He’s hired talented staff, all very professional, efficient and supportive. This contributes to Arizona Facial Plastic having an excellent reputation.
When I come for a procedure I look forward to seeing the staff and trust I’m in good hands. I feel like I have a bond with all of them and that they truly care about my facial endeavors.
I would recommend Arizona Facial Plastic.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christopher Andrade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2LzJrgoTsjK34TDjjtQ6V_gn1buMe-4bdQ-OaLsaGUBX1_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a pleasant experience! I'd like to point out that this is my first time getting any sort to professional, facial treatment. I have been interested in facial/skin care for a while now, and it was about time I started looking into ways to improve my routine.

The moment I walked in, I was greeted almost immediately. I noticed that the front waiting room, despite being more of doctor's office, felt more like a spa than anything else. My appointment was started promptly, where they explained fully the facial I was about to receive, and what would be following it. Sheena, my aesthetician for the day, and she was fantastic. She was quite exuberant, and was so pleasant to interact with. She also explained each step of my facial, which product she was using, and how each one works. I will say the there is a portion of extraction, while a bit uncomfortable, was definitely necessary. After the treatment was done, my face felt so fresh, light, & light, and also had such a glow to it.

Following the treatment, I spoke with Shea who also explained a little further in detail about different methods/treatments for continued care. I was then taken to a room to get a Visia Skin Analysis, which shows variations in the skin, any particular areas of opportunity, and ways to prevent certain forms of damage.

Overall, my experience was great. There was so much ease in talking with the staff, especially if there was anything I was interested in, they listened and then elaborated in detail. I appreciate them so much for their time, their work, and showing me a great experience for my first time. I intend to look further into future treatments and how they can help me looking younger, longer!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESgP6NO8h3Fk8s_cwjo9Sj_62rzicf98RG_4GPB70nbKWeCxBbmb1W35ThQWVaxS5ABLL74HQGjkm1CQO9vlNgKh9A-vxZOgpLB8zISKQrOSbmG4ecLhJCTHFYlYTULgI6E13S3","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETMNs4Yh7pGek57iUG73cBdvJC1vIbER-duXifppjLCvVpIEPB7yDzEASMIU4OwRKJHFQBUiLOOZZwv7yjrSTBCAISM-g589-y96c3zjSvs9BtmIYbdcXVELmuulRJXVllFI51Z","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETYJoLGHXWyi9CYoyG-qK-32GiFrTtd7LFCZSfNqDhyhL_4xGxXRKkYD5kfShQLD7my8Lc1rCU2VNRuFeHCZa-qPk1wxpBq9E0HghmKmD0nio0vCzBkSa2CSwCP2wbe_pBz2dYkDw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETXHZKDd7C6eAmITrNhfBNR7krpdDMetvgAYaskrRGVG_ceFvdbxgfzAbSvVce_GrRRaxcPRNblQEHWkJwkGEnUAjIzX4SXQVLoviKrfnvGZLXJzLYLcC-FmnnXAAWH4aeTV-U3"],"When":"2025-6-4"},{"Name":"Jan Abrams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJL3fbw2ABOm-w1d6ditBEi8PisACFxenvwZtBBj2HAjnAouw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to Sheena for about 10 months for advanced skin treatments that are customized for my sensitive skin. I've been coming for years and AZFP continues to exceed my expectations.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Megan Rubin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLf2a9v0F59gwwywZK0FraTHWcXerTiRmdgW77AlIsECpYrxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I went here to go get a few chemical peels done for my acne scars and the staff was nice but don’t be fooled I got a chemical peel done and she got it in my eye and my eye has been so dry ever since. I never leave reviews but the malpractice has affected my life to this day so I’m just here to warn others. I really don’t know what to do at this point but I would avoid this place at all costs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLZ6hou0bFQYecThHB_31TdX8013c9C2CZbwkAIZI8phCSRiKRFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The intimate lightening package was a waste of money, time and energy. [{"Name":"Elizabeth Hagberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYkDg2GoalPPULU7f5ixeCQR2YmxB9_hk1RbyUlYnB1vXbug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a physician working in the field of cosmetic medicine, I was very particular with my choice of the surgeon I wanted to perform my deep plane, facelift and neck lift. Despite the fact that we were in different states, I chose to go with Dr. Admire. He was wonderful. The consult was comfortable and he supported my choice to do these procedures. He was very confident in how he could help me which I really appreciated. He did not seem daunted by the task at hand-as I had some underlying scarring from previous procedures.
When  visiting Dr Admire’s the clinic I felt very welcomed. The staff was wonderful. They answered questions and informed me of the next steps in the process.
My surgery went very well. The surgery care center was fantastic. Everybody was kind and professional. My recovery was great. I only needed some Tylenol for pain.
Dr. Admire is particular and very conscientious about his surgery. He was also very readily available for questions or concerns throughout the process.
Obviously, I’m so happy with my results after five weeks! My swelling has gone down over the last few weeks, and I have been so thrilled that the tethering and scarring from a previous treatment were eliminated! I’m so thankful and grateful to Dr. Admire for his wonderful work! As a physician, I highly recommend him!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sakara Galbraith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzQX0GqLAbhJJtgaYkj0Hav292ObR7MH6d4_OqpLTeXD7neQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hannah is my go-to Nurse Practitioner and Aesthetic Injector! I’m already loving my results and can’t wait to see Hannah again soon!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Davis (Sleekskin Aesthetics)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDHfMqz2oj_2JFI89T05jC1Amtgaxgf1Nq8RvLYlkinrXKtLia=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wanting to share that you are in great hands with Dr. Admire and his staff! I had a breast reduction and lift, liposuction, C-section scar revision, and Renuvion therapy, and from the very first consultation I knew I was in the right hands.

What truly set Dr. Moenster apart from other surgeons I consulted with in Tucson and Scottsdale was how listened to I felt.  She took the time to understand my specific wants and goals and then walked me through multiple options to consider . I never felt talked at or boxed into one approach — unlike other consultations where I was simply told what I “had to do.” Her patience, kindness, and excellent bedside manner made the entire process feel comfortable and collaborative.

Dr. Moenster was also incredibly honest and transparent about what to expect. She provided realistic expectations while still making me feel confident and excited, and her surgical skill truly speaks for itself. I am only two weeks post-op and I am already so incredibly pleased with my results.

Her staff deserves just as much praise. Everyone I interacted with was wonderful, responsive, and supportive throughout the entire process. A special thank you to her patient coordinator, Diana, who was amazing to work with, as well as another coordinator who was filling in from the Green Valley when I had my initial consultation.  The office was always quick to respond and made everything feel seamless.

I am beyond grateful to Dr. Moenster and her team and would recommend her without hesitation to anyone considering plastic surgery.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Annette Mueller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeWlZjlnwZj0Hci_Ih-NqDEiTTUg9zU2VOYbpd6b3_ziu7sEOW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough  wonderful things about Dermatology and Plastic Surgery of Arizona, Sierra Vista office! I went in for a surgical procedure today full of anxiety!! There may have been dramatic sighing  and possibly a few tears. Definitely some “Are you sure about this?” moments.
From the second I walked in, the staff treated me with such kindness and patience.  Kristin was my first medical staff to receive my tears and nerves. She was empathic and real in her response to me!! Molly, NP held my hand (emotionally and literally), while we AGAIN discussed the reasons for (I was still not fully committed) and the procedure before is.  She explained everything so clearly and calmly that my anxiety slowly packed its bags and left the room.
During the procedure, Molly and Kristen talked me through (I didnt want to hear about each step) with reassurance and even managed to make me smile. Imagine that,  smiling and giggling while being the world’s most anxious dermatology patient! Their confidence and gentle approach made all the difference. I truly felt cared for, safe, and respected the entire time.
The procedure itself went smoothly, and the aftercare was explained verbally and in writing.  If you’re nervous about a dermatologic surgery, this is absolutely the place to go. They are professional, compassionate, highly skilled, and apparently very experienced in handling teary-eyed patients like me.
Five stars for exceptional care, steady hands, and for turning my near-meltdown into a genuinely positive experience!  Thank you Molly and Kristen!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alicia Dinsmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6NPwC61biQ5uqK6KXuD1HEhayEIOK0sNm9mWJFpTO9ZYiByOm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was 7 min late to my appointment and they wouldn't let me be seen. [{"Name":"Haley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgKBFU6Wt4Qc_cO7nBq17rseR9Iehn5XSe7dM_1xGwobjaFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Two months ago I decided to finally do the procedure I had been putting off for over a year. I recently did the BBL, magic tight, and lipo 360 with Dr. Mata. From the moment I walked into Natural Results, the entire process from start to finish was professional! The entire staff were so friendly and knowledgeable. They genuinely cared about my surgery and recovery. The staff took the time to answer all my questions and not to mention patient care was top notch! Thanks, Ashlee for being so amazing. You’re awesome at what you do! Also, Fatima was so amazing with the lymphatic massages. You’re amazing at what you do as well! Again, thank you Dr. Mata and the entire team for making this experience amazing and helping me achieve the results I wanted!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arleigh ARLAY","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXbTPNMyiCq-u2CPPXHMCdgSkgIk7rW92JWsBzz3dxRl65QqoX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have seen and been treated by a few different plastic surgeons over the span of 2 decades. I am 40 now and this surgery has been a breeze compared to surgeries I’ve had even in my early 20s. All the surgeons in the past I went with were all generally good BUT their skills were not even in the same league as Dr. Mata! Even his staff, you can tell he has lovingly and carefully curated with great pride, because they are all graceful, smart, and kind. I felt so safe, appreciated, cared for, and listened to.

I have quietly observed and experience first hand Dr. Mata’s high emotional  intelligence. Not only is he eloquent with his bedside manner, but he is truly the best of the best artistically with his craft! I feel this with all my heart, as I have experience with 4 other surgeons before him from California to Utah. I’m only 4 weeks out from my tummy tuck revision and I already feel so beautiful and healthy! I have been chasing my pre-baby body for decades and he gave it back to me! 😭🫠

Another important thing to me is, I am mixed/ mestiza. To be exact, I am half Zuni Pueblo Native American and half Dutch. My body type favors my Native American side (for reference my natural body type is same type of the late Selena Quintinilla ) because of that I feel like other surgeons in my past just had a hard time understanding my body type.  Dr. Mata understood my body type and spoke my natural curve’s language. However, I believe his talent and skill is great enough to understand any and all different body types… but for me it was the first time I ever encountered a Doctor that understood mine and I am beyond over the moon happy and excited!!! I feel like crying every day because I’m so happy! I’ll be sharing my results and a more intimate review through real self for anyone curious.

I’m so grateful for Dr. Mata’s expertise and his amazing team. Also, the anesthesiologist that was there for me on surgery day was also an angel from heaven I swear on my life she was! I plan on going to see Dr. Mata’s wife soon and having her do some little things for me too. I usually get little fillers and Botox in Tucson a few times a year, but I just want to be solely with Dr. Mata and his wife now when it comes to my body and face.

Your body is your temple. It’s sacred. It is so scary to trust others with your life and your body. The vessel that carries you through this life,  hugs your family, loves your children, and presents your light to the world. However, Dr. Mata genuinely has my trust with my temple and I’m so grateful I finally found a brilliant doctor that gave me what I dreamed of and knew before I ever gave birth. Bring on the string bikinis and skinny dipping this summer!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeromy Spaulding (Twisted)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUycPDp0-e0DS2eFu-bhdlf3Bton2q_Y5cxx-48tAf4qmIwu-QO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had gynecomastia surgery at Natural Results with Dr. Carlos Mata. I honestly couldn’t be happier with my experience and results.

From the very first consultation, the entire team made me feel comfortable and confident in my decision. The staff was incredibly friendly, welcoming, and professional. They took the time to answer all of my questions thoroughly and never made me feel rushed. Any concerns I had were addressed with patience and care, which really helped ease my nerves going into surgery.

The level of communication and support throughout the whole process was outstanding. I always felt informed about what to expect before, during, and after the procedure. That reassurance made a huge difference.

Most importantly, the results from my gynecomastia surgery have been amazing. The outcome exceeded my expectations and has truly boosted my confidence. The contour and overall appearance are already beyond what I was hoping for. I’m extremely grateful to the team at Natural Results for their expertise and professionalism.

I would highly recommend Natural Results to anyone considering gynecomastia surgery. It was a positive experience from start to finish, and I’m beyond happy with my decision.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalie Liberatore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMcdoSTKYKANRAtQ7ZUGlHGfAZ24wKs6KHL2urnumxg56G5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough wonderful things about Dr. Mata and the entire staff. From the very first consultation, I felt heard, respected, and genuinely cared for. Dr. Mata took the time to explain everything clearly, answered all of my questions, and made sure I felt confident and comfortable every step of the way.

The office staff is just as exceptional—warm, professional, and incredibly attentive. Scheduling was easy, follow-ups were thorough, and I always felt welcomed and supported. On the day of the procedure, everything ran smoothly, and the care I received was top-notch.

Most importantly, my results exceeded my expectations. They look natural and exactly what I was hoping for. I am beyond happy with my experience and my outcome. If you’re considering a plastic surgeon who is skilled, compassionate, and truly invested in their patients, I highly recommend Dr. Mata and his amazing team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Devon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKj4SBA-gsQqfKnskAQdOm3cb73TMDQYTuCVrAudfcymVkYCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a breast augmentation done 3 months ago. Start to finish, the experience with Natural Results has been extraordinary! The staff is welcoming and genuine and made the entire process simple and easy. The amazing care has continued in my follow up appointments and I would definitely recommend getting work done here!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cindy Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmKUSWdX6r1Ntope-J-asG09HhXUNWco9kcREq01Os6dJQw50=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If there was such thing as a 10 star rating I’d give it!

I had a great experience at Natural Results Plastic Surgery office. To start,The front end staff are very welcoming immediately remembers who I am and greets me with such kindness the moment I walked in. The office is always clean, well-organized, and had a welcoming atmosphere.
Jen who took the time to listen to my concerns, explained everything clearly, and made me feel comfortable and cared for. I never felt rushed, and I appreciated the thoroughness and compassion shown during my visit. Also Nurse Mata! I am always in good hands with her! Soon as you enter that room for your services it’s as if you’ve known her for yours the level of comfort is always on point!

See for your self’s! Highly recommend this office to anyone looking for quality care and a team that truly cares about their patients!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6pPguK3k0ni6b3F-FFuko2L5fDEj_VPTzu-drpR2YYZIAeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s officially been one year since my revision liposuction, ab etching, and skin tightening on my stomach and flanks with Dr. Mata—and I couldn’t be more thrilled with my results!

A couple years ago, I had liposuction on my stomach with another surgeon. While there was improvement, I still had some areas that bothered me enough to seek a revision. I chose Dr. Mata based on his stellar reputation, impressive before-and-after photos, and outstanding reviews—and I’m so glad I did.

From the moment you walk into his office, you’re greeted by friendly staff who make you feel right at home. His entire team is professional, attentive, and supportive throughout the whole process. Dr. Mata himself has excellent bedside manner—kind, honest, and incredibly skilled. He warned me that because I’d had prior lipo, my recovery would likely be more challenging. I didn’t believe him at first, but he was absolutely right!

During my six-week post-op recovery, I wore double foam with my compression garment due to some fluid build-up. To support my healing, I followed all of his recovery recommendations, including weekly lymphatic drainage massages with Fatima, his in-office therapist—who was absolutely wonderful. I truly believe following his protocol made all the difference.

At my one-year follow-up, Dr. Mata showed me my before photos, and I couldn’t believe the transformation. It was hard to believe that was even me! I finally have the toned, defined stomach and abs I’ve always worked so hard for—but could never achieve until now.

Over the past year, I’ve received so many compliments and questions about what I’ve been doing. For the first time in my life, I feel completely confident showing my stomach—especially in a bikini!

If you’re considering liposuction, skin tightening, or ab etching, look no further than Dr. Mata at Natural Results. His artistry, skill, and natural-looking outcomes speak for themselves. You won’t be disappointed—you’ll just wish you did it sooner!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJs6tdrEkrxdAT2wrfXZpg0NZFons8pHTG4H8-QCN3Q16aLbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I chose Dr. Mata for my lipedema reduction procedures and had a very positive experience. I’m grateful for his care and for the support of his exceptional staff, and I hope to complete my remaining non-lipedema procedures with him in the near future.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Courtney Frances Tapia-Acosta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCl0D9FtZ2g1qGE8GS1LN1lGJPUwIXVubemtl7zPpCvL7KL2To=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a patient of Dr. Olson since 2019 and have undergone two procedures with him—a rhinoplasty and a lip lift. I am meeting with him today for my third procedure, which speaks to the level of trust and confidence I have in his work. I truly would not go to anyone else.

Dr. Olson is incredibly knowledgeable and highly trained in facial plastic surgery. What I appreciate most about him is his philosophy that the goal of facial surgery is not to make you look like someone else, but to help you look like the best version of yourself. He takes a thoughtful and conservative approach that prioritizes natural-looking results. I am extremely happy with the outcomes of my procedures. The results are subtle, balanced, and enhance my features while still looking completely like me.

Beyond his skill as a surgeon, Dr. Olson is also a genuinely kind and thoughtful person who takes the time to listen and ensure his patients feel comfortable and informed throughout the entire process. It is always a pleasure meeting with him for consultations and follow-ups.

He also works alongside his wife, who is one of the kindest and most welcoming people you could meet. Together they create such a warm and supportive environment that you immediately feel at ease. I truly appreciate the care and attention they both provide, and I always look forward to my visits.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark and Janine Shotwell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh83yTijrmSBYlduTYL4cJMS_LYSfoURoohXGzjYbeNS7j2c0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow is all I can say. I recently had a facelift and neck lift, and from my very first consultation through recovery, I felt completely supported and cared for. Dr. Olsen’s bedside manner is truly exceptional. He is calming, reassuring, honest, and incredibly patient. I was very nervous about having this procedure done, but he took the time to answer every single question I had — whether by text, email, or in person — with openness, kindness, and understanding.

He never made me feel rushed or dismissed. Instead, he made me feel heard and respected. That level of communication gave me tremendous confidence going into surgery.

His nurse, Mercy, and the entire office staff are equally amazing. They are warm, professional, attentive, and genuinely caring. You can tell this is a team that truly loves what they do and cares deeply about their patients.

Most importantly, my results are beautiful. I feel refreshed and natural — still me, just better. I am so grateful I chose Dr. Olsen. If you are considering a facelift or neck lift and want a skilled surgeon with integrity and heart, I highly recommend him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diana Lindberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfPJeZrO6lO0DHglgDr37FTk2n-vvYnZJokGbx_hZs2fIkw36V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Olson is not only skilled and careful, but also truly compassionate. I’m very grateful for their care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLh9WdTeLftD9-Q0XbOLjDLvESoHt92YDujEH7YzCc7elmynhny=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Almost a full year since forehead reduction surgery and 10/10. Dr Olson’s care and knowledge were top tier!! I felt so safe and my result turned out beautiful. No visible scarring, my hairline is gorgeous and I’m very happy with the size of my forehead now!!! He’s honestly an exceptional doctor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Glesener","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaGtiZx5DBz8aopAh30oDKQoRsMamim6y9fhbPf-bZKDGZ7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is hard as a man to find a plastic surgeon whom you believe will have the skill and aesthetics to preform a facelift, especially on a man!
I wanted a lower facelift to minimize my sagging lower jawline. And I had been researching this procedure, especially for men, off and on for at least a year.
I knew men were more difficult to preform facelift surgery on because of their thick skin and did have a different aesthetic/look than women do.
So I searched around and had consultations,
one in Scottsdale and another in Phoenix.  But I just didn’t feel right about these doctors.
Well I searched in my own backyard, Tucson and checked out all the major plastic surgeons in the area and
found Dr Olson. I selected him for a consultation mainly because nearly every surgery he did was mostly from the shoulders up…hence more focused and he had been doing surgery since the 90’s…so experienced, especially with men.
The consultation was amazing. He checked off all the boxes by explaining everything throughly. He had a very approachable demeanor and was personable.
He did an amazing job on my face and it was very obvious that his skill level was upper echelon!!
Yes there are a lot of plastic surgeons out there and it is difficult to know who are the better ones. Dr. Olson is one of those doctors. A surgeon at the highest level in his
genre!!
My post op care was excellent with Mercy and the staff!
What a great experience!","Images":null,"When":""}]

I can’t express how happy I’m with my results. Thank you Dr. Shuell!!! You are the best!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Travis Balthes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLXwf0rmOBmfMClsq8fLhK3L0jjMBrS3w3d-Ad2nkC5Wn_4oY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I booked a consultation under their $2,000 off liposuction offer. I dont know the names of how they brand these procedures but I know at the time of consultation I was quoted $10,900 then on a sticky note (!) they put $9,265 - 15% off, and verbally (!!) was told less the $2,000, and they'd knock $400 off if I pay cash to save credit card fees. ~$6,800 cash for lipo with the skin tightening (all I need really). Now, I'm on a long acting medication that makes my pain management case slightly more complex.

The office said most patients can 'get by' with ibuprofen + another medication but she'd check with the doctor. I'm not sure if they ever checked because that medication has a similar interaction with my medication leaving my only option for pain management right now the same as what I'd take for a bad headache (4 Advil). I dont know about you but I'm just not comfortable with that for something like ab and flank lipo. I hope I dont need it but, as the patient, I'm the only one that suffers if it's not enough. For that reason, I wanted to put a deposit down at consultation and wait until the medication is out of my system and I'm able to coordinate care with my other physician but they told me at the time of the consultation they only book ~6 weeks out max.

I needed at least at least 60 days but I continued to receive emails with the $2,000 off offer so I assumed the pricing that was discussed was still valid until I got an email saying the offer ends 7/31. I called about putting a deposit down now to book now that my medication is less of a concern and was told the offer no longer applied because the offer is to "fill spots for the month." I said "I'm still receiving emails with that offer so I assume you still need to fill spots this month so I'm not understanding." They told me to "go back and look at the emails because the offer verbiage is confusing but its clear." Right. Well, I looked at the emails and nowhere do they have any terms listed anywhere. It literally just says $2000 off so I 'missed' that the offer is apparently only if you book the same month as the consultation (mind you they intentionally dont put anything in writing regarding the $2,000 off offer that could be construed as a contract in your paperwork!). My understanding now is that the verbal offer I was provided is likely a separate $2000 off offer they use if bookings are down that month to encourage immediate bookings and is likely unrelated to the marketing I was receiving. Either that or their marketing is misleading to fill consultations and pressure you into getting surgery knowing full well most patients would be very uncomfortable with that.

Kind of a turn off business practice that really sucks if you're someone like me who can't really book the surgery due to legitimate medical reasons. The person i spoke with said she'd explain my situation and ask the doctor and the office manager. They said they'd honor the written 15% discount they quoted me but wouldn't honor the $2,000. On principle, it's just really hard to justify parting ways with $2000 extra dollars of my hard earned cash when someone else walking in today without legitimate medical concerns isn't. It also seems like not the best medical practice to financially incentivize patients like me into getting surgery within a certain time frame if its not the best medical decision for them because it's good for your surgery business. They do have lots of great 5 star reviews but Im very surprised nobody has mentioned this, which makes me question if these reviews are real patients or what. Maybe this is just how these practices operate and I wasnt aware of it but I'm sure there's others that might experience this so just make sure you're well informed :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beth Horwath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgxbSbg4VuQEWa1SytavLK2ScKNvPARYuEsx_wmELNiPMsfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I found Infini Cosmetic Associates (Infini Phoenix Liposuction) after researching facial laser treatments for sun damage mainly from the time I spent in the sun when I was younger, and in tanning beds, etc. I had some dark spots, blotchy and uneven skintone that I was wanting to improve. I read about the Fraxel Dual 1550/1927 laser being a great option to address my concerns. I searched for providers in the Phoenix area and found Infini has this laser, so I made an appt for a consult with Callie Cox (their Licensed Aesthetician, CMLT).

Callie is AMAZING. She is very down-to-earth, thorough, knowledgable, sets realistic expectations, and I immediately felt very comfortable with her. She agreed that Fraxel Dual would be a great option for me & that she can customize how she performs each treatment, alternating between the two lasers on different regions of my face to address specific issues. So, I purchased a package of 4 treatments (they had a special at the time).

Cut to today, I have now had a total of 3 treatments (one month apart) - which is what Callie recommended to give me the results I was hoping for. I am VERY happy with the results after the 3 treatments. The dark spots went away almost entirely and my skin improved dramatically as a result. I am holding off on the 4th treatment until after the summer to decide when I want to proceed with that and perhaps other treatments on other areas.

If you are considering laser treatments, I 100% recommend Infini, and Callie! I had an awesome experience all the way around! The staff at Infini is top notch, friendly and great to work with!

Side note: I also got to meet Dr Hall at my last appointment, and would definitely trust him to consult with in the future if I am ever interested in the surgical procedures he provides.","Images":null,"When":""}]
